dimensions.name: Fairness & Bias
dimensions.description: Equitable outcomes across demographic and linguistic groups

dimensions.name: Explainability (XAI)
dimensions.description: Why did the model decide this? Can we trust the answer?

dimensions.name: Privacy
dimensions.description: Data protection, minimization, and consent in training and inference

dimensions.name: Safety & Alignment
dimensions.description: Preventing harmful outputs and steering models toward intended values

dimensions.name: Robustness
dimensions.description: Resisting attacks, jailbreaks, and distribution shift

dimensions.name: Governance
dimensions.description: Oversight, accountability, audit trails, and compliance

dimensions.name: Sustainability
dimensions.description: Environmental and economic cost of compute at scale

dimensions.name: Social Impact
dimensions.description: Societal effects at scale — labor, power, geopolitics
